creator: kato@eclogite.eps.nagoya-u.ac.jp
text:
When we try to install FreeBSD via anonymous FTP, password field is set as:
        installer@hostname.of.server.name
because hostname is produced from URL in ftp_startup.c.

The password field should be:
        installer@MY.HOST.NAME

How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD via anonymous FTP.
